prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约为13287名→14997名→13605名→29542名→15545名。2024年出现异常断档（位次大幅后移至29542名），2025年迅速回弹至15545名，但仍高于2021–2023年水平，整体呈波动后移态势。近2年基准位次约15545名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021年97人、2022年99人、2023年102人、2024年102人、2025年103人，呈逐年小幅递增；2026年计划90人，较2025年减少13人，缩招约12.6%，竞争明显加剧，对位次有上移（数字减小）压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在80名左右，属中上游211层次；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考；2026年周期仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件通报。抖音热度总排名第77（一般），短视频曝光中等偏低。历史投档异常记录显示2025年该校在辽宁出现热门专业位次大幅下滑，可能对2026年报考心理产生滞后影响；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A（唯一A-及以上学科），是该校王牌；计算机、电气、机械等工科专业虽未单独获A评级，但整体工科实力在211院校中位居前列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科优势高度契合；土木建筑类专业热度分化观望。辽宁省2026年高考总报名约20万人，物理类考生估算约14.3万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争基数未明显变化；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，在辽宁省属跨省招生；该校在辽宁招生计划占比较小（约90–103人），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15545名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招（-12.6%）带来的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面对报考热度的抑制、以及考生总数基本持平等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（数字减小）。预测最低位次约14168名，区间13668–14668名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间13668–14668名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如13600名以内）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等热门一档专业；位次接近区间上限（14600名以外）应以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中位专业。该校管理科学与工程（A级学科）未在辽宁物理类招生，报考时需注意专业清单。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 13287 → 14997 → 13605 → 29542 → 15545. In 2024, there was an abnormal gap (ranking significantly dropped to 29542), and in 2025 it quickly rebounded to 15545, but still higher than the 2021–2023 levels, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. The recent 2-year baseline ranking is about 15545; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning was 97 in 2021, 99 in 2022, 102 in 2023, 102 in 2024, and 103 in 2025, showing a slight annual increase; the 2026 plan is 90, a decrease of 13 from 2025, a reduction of about 12.6%, significantly intensifying competition and putting upward pressure on rankings (numerical decrease).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 80th, with stable rankings around 80 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the reputation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants; the 2026 cycle remains somewhat negative, involving reports of academic misconduct. Douyin popularity ranks 77th overall (average), with moderately low short video exposure. Historical admission anomalies show that in 2025, the university experienced a significant decline in rankings for popular majors in Liaoning, which may have a lagging psychological impact on 2026 applicants; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering received an A (the only A- or above discipline), making it the university's flagship; computer, electrical, mechanical, and other engineering majors did not individually receive A ratings, but the overall engineering strength ranks among the top in 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning well with the university's engineering strengths; civil engineering and architecture majors show divided popularity and are under observation. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Liaoning is about 200,000, with an estimated 143,000 Physics Category candidates, roughly the same as 2025, so the competition base has not changed significantly; Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, and recruits across provinces in Liaoning; the enrollment plan in Liaoning is relatively small (about 90–103 people), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15545, the intensified competition due to the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-12.6%), the suppression of application enthusiasm due to somewhat negative reputation, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move forward (numerical decrease) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 14168, with a range of 13668–14668.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13668–14668, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 13600), focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (outside 14600), mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety, supplemented by mid-range Tier 2 majors. Note that the university's Management Science and Engineering (A-level discipline) does not recruit in the Physics Category in Liaoning, so pay attention to the major list when applying.
